price: I ne ženite se onima koje su oženili očevi vaši nakon onoga što je bilo - to su bili razvrat, mržnja i ružan put.
arabic: وَلَا تَنكِحُواْ مَا نَكَحَ ءَابَآؤُكُم مِّنَ ٱلنِّسَآءِ إِلَّا مَا قَدۡ سَلَفَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَٰحِشَةٗ وَمَقۡتٗا وَسَآءَ سَبِيلًا

version.title: Bosnian Translation - Muhammad Mihanovich
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into Bosnian by Muhammad Mihanovich, printed in 2013. some referred verses corrected by Supervision of Rowwad Translation Center. The original translation is available for suggestions, continuous evaluation, and development.

meta.transliteration: walā tankiḥū mā nakaḥa ābāukum mina al-nisāi illā mā qad salafa innahu kāna fāḥishatan wamaqtan wasāa sabīlan
